instructions: Choose a topic from the following list of 35 topics related to web development and accessibility.
Once the topic is chosen, research and write an original 300-word article on that topic.
Ensure the article is in English.
Cite all sources you use, clearly specifying website links or references.
Make the tone informative, professional, and aimed at a web development audience.
Include practical examples if possible, and ensure the content is verifiable.
After finishing the article, provide a list of sources used.
